text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1163.  
But if we apply modern time zone rules retroactively:  
Asia/Tokyo = UTC+9, US/Pacific = UTC-7 (or UTC-8 with DST, but DST not in effect in September).  
Time difference = 9 - (-7) = 16 hours ahead for Tokyo relative to Pacific.  
So 15:00 Tokyo time minus 16 hours = previous day 23:00 (same date in Tokyo is previous date in Pacific).  
September 9, 1163 15:00 Tokyo → September 8, 1163 23:00 US/Pacific.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1163-09-08 23:00
